description: Helpdesk Administrator role — scoped to au-helpdesk Administrative Unit only. Tier-1 support password resets.

assignments.justification: Tier-1 helpdesk permanent assignment scoped to au-helpdesk only
assignments.notes: Permanent active is acceptable at this privilege level when scoped to an AU

notes: Scoped role assignment — these users cannot manage any user outside the au-helpdesk AU.
